personas.name: Mindful Seeker
personas.description: A user comparing meditation apps who cares most about real free access, optional donations, and an experience without ads or paywalls.
context: Seeking alternative to paid or ad-heavy meditation apps
constraints: Frustrated with ads and subscriptions in meditation apps

personas.name: Insomniac
personas.description: A user who opens Medito at bedtime and depends on sleep content, calm audio, and playback that stays out of the way.
context: When waking up in the night
constraints: Limited by short sleep story duration

personas.name: Anxious Individual
personas.description: A user who turns to Medito during anxiety, stress, grief, panic, or emotional overload and needs targeted support quickly.

personas.name: Mindfulness Seeker
personas.description: Individual seeking to establish a daily meditation habit
goals: Progress through meditation courses and challenges
pain_points: Difficulty maintaining streaks and tracking progress
Limited syncing of streaks across devices
Some features not functioning as expected after updates
context: Using the app daily for meditation and mindfulness
Appreciating features like courses, streak tracking, and timer
constraints: Need for easy-to-use interface for beginners
Importance of accessibility and free features
Desire for streak tracking and progress monitoring

personas.name: Frustrated Medito User
personas.description: A frequent user who expects playback, search, login, and progress to keep working across updates, devices, and everyday interruptions.
goals: To have a stable and functional meditation app
To track progress seamlessly across devices
pain_points: App crashes or stops working after updates
context: Regularly uses the Medito app for meditation
Expects updates to improve the app experience
constraints: Needs to manually check for updates
Experiences disruptions in meditation practice due to app issues
